name: Mary Jane's Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt together until just begins to boil: butter, water, sugar.
Remove from heat.
2. Add flour, baking soda and half of the chocolate chips.
3. Add eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Add vanilla.
5. Stir in nuts and the remaining chocolate chips.
6. Pour into an 8 or 9-inch square pan and bake at 350 degrees for 30-35 minutes.
These are best stored in the refrigerator. Otherwise, they are too gooey.
